step_rationale: Thromboxane-A2 metabolite; direct marker of COX-1-driven platelet activation.
mechanism: Stable metabolite of thromboxane-A2 that quantifies COX-1-dependent platelet activation amplifying thrombosis.

references.title: Biomarkers of in vivo platelet activation in coronary artery disease: a systematic review and meta-analysis: communication from the SSC of the ISTH.
references.journal: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH

references.title: Significance of urinary 11-dehydro-thromboxane Bin age-related diseases: Focus on atherothrombosis.
